originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Sweeping Hyperparameters Across PufferLib Environments with Muon Optimizer
summary: Analyzed overnight sweep results for Breakout and other environments. Tuned hyperparameter ranges, integrated Muon optimizer and cosine annealing, and validated that a single set of default hyperparameters achieves state-of-the-art performance on nearly every PufferLib benchmark.
